name: rivetos
description: RivetOS extensions for Claude Code — persistent cross-session memory, recall, and lifecycle capture.

plugins.name: rivet-memory
plugins.description: Persistent memory for Claude Code. Adds the RivetOS MCP server (memory_search, memory_browse, skills, web) for recall, plus lifecycle hooks that capture every prompt and tool call into the RivetOS memory DB — so weeks later you can find the exact command that fixed something.

plugins.name: rivet-den
plugins.description: Live pixel-art diorama of your Claude Code session — lifecycle hooks stream agent activity (plans, tool runs, thinking, compaction naps) to a den-server where the room plays out in real time.
